**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Nanjing Hongshen Industrial Intelligent Technology Co., Ltd. is an 'asset-light industrial software and robotics system integrator' misunderstood by the official system. The forensic engine has completely erased the underlying preset Apple Inc. massive consumer electronics OEM system. The official commercial system, intimidated by extremely fierce terms like 'mining machinery manufacturing' and 'industrial robot manufacturing' in its license, directly defined it as an 'Electronic Device Manufacturing' or heavy-industry machinery major factory. However, the forensic probe directly grabbed two core parameters that shatter its heavy-industry hallucination: first, although the paid-in capital is 600,000 and it has 15 insured employees (proving it is absolutely not a shell), its registered address is located in 'Room 101-21, Building E, Science and Technology Entrepreneurship R&D Incubation Complex.' In a co-working desk or micro-office (101-21) within an incubator building, it is absolutely impossible to set up a mining machinery manufacturing assembly line or an industrial robot assembly plant. Combined with its official domain 'hismartcn.com' and the massive presence of 'software development,' 'intelligent control system integration,' and 'industrial design services' in the latter half of its license, the diagnostic conclusion is reached: this is a typical 'Fabless' industrial intelligent system integrator and software R&D studio. These 15 employees are primarily industrial software engineers and on-site implementation engineers. They do not 'manufacture' the steel bodies of robots, but instead develop the 'brains' (software algorithms) that control the robots, purchasing the hardware and performing installation, debugging, and system integration at the client's site.
